name: merge-pilot
description: Detect and intelligently resolve merge conflicts from multiple agent outputs on the same files.
intent_triggers: 解決多 Agent 產出的合併衝突
比較兩份修改後的檔案差異
自動合併不衝突的修改
偵測目錄中的衝突檔案
三方合併原始檔與兩份修改
three-way merge base and two variants
scan agent outputs for merge conflicts

command.description: Subcommand: detect, scan, merge, resolve, summary

output.description: Output file path for merged result

mark_conflicts.description: Mark conflict sections with git-style markers instead of auto-resolving

interactive.description: Interactive mode: choose resolution for each conflict

examples.intent: 三方合併兩份 Agent 產出的修改
examples.invocation: merge-pilot merge --base original.py --theirs agent1.py --ours agent2.py -o merged.py

examples.intent: 掃描目錄中的所有衝突檔案
